token.name: AUTONOMOPOLY
token.verificationMethod: cast call on-chain read + DexScreener API

purpose: Accelerate autopoietic, perpetual inference for tokenized agents on Liquid Protocol. AUTONO is the vehicle: as AUTONO/DIEM pool volume grows, DIEM LP fees compound into Venice inference credits, funding the cognition that drives more protocol activity, which compounds into more fees. Self-sustaining, self-reinforcing, self-extending.

market.note: Live snapshot — update each tick via DexScreener API
market.holderCount: unavailable — query Basescan with valid API key or run check-portfolio

claims.disposition: all → ETH/DIEM v3 1% LP (accumulate mode: compounding yield, not spending on inference)

diemDisposition.accumulate_mode: all DIEM → ETH/DIEM Uniswap v3 1% LP to compound yield. Venice inference runs free on llama-3.3-70b until daily fee rate clears 5 DIEM/day threshold.
diemDisposition.build_mode: DIEM → stake on Venice for inference credits → fund Opus reasoning on product work

agent.role: deployer and DIEM LP fee recipient
